evals.prompt: Generate a talent market landscape report for VP-level technology governance leaders in Singapore and the Asia-Pacific region.
evals.expected_output: Lists available report types, selects talent market landscape, collects inputs (industry, role, location), confirms 15 credit cost, starts report generation, polls for completion, downloads and presents the report.

assertions.name: lists_report_types
assertions.description: Calls atlas_list_report_types to discover available types

assertions.name: confirms_cost
assertions.description: Shows 15 credit cost and confirms before generating

assertions.name: starts_report
assertions.description: Calls atlas_start_report with correct report type and inputs

assertions.name: downloads_report
assertions.description: Calls atlas_download_report to retrieve the PDF
